author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Win $50,000 in Prizes in our First Online Hackathon

Star Atlas wants to support Solana builders with our first online hackathon.

Submit before September 7 and compete for $50,000 in prizes in the Naabathon! Valid submissions will also receive an exclusive Ogrika Ruch skin!

 | Learn more: https://naabathon.staratlas.com/
